steps.label: signup_page
steps.title: ZonForge Sentinel
steps.body:
ZF
ZonForge Sentinel

AI-POWERED CYBER EARLY WARNING

Stand up a secure customer workspace in one step.

Create your account, claim your workspace, and land directly in the ZonForge customer app with onboarding ready.

Proactive Threat Detection
Cloud Security Signals
Identity Threat Protection
AI-Native Detection
Analyst-Ready
Multi-Source Visibility
Create your ZonForge workspace

Your first account becomes the workspace owner. You can invite more members later.

Full name
Workspace name
Work email
Password
Use at least 10 characters with one letter and one number.
Create workspace
Already have an account? Sign in

steps.label: onboarding_page
steps.title: ZonForge Sentinel
steps.body:
Workspace onboarding

Serial 18 Workspace 1775685781511 is ready.

Your customer account, workspace, and owner membership are active. Use this short checklist to confirm the workspace, choose the first source you plan to connect, and continue into the live customer dashboard.

Workspace slug
serial-18-workspace-1775685781511
Started: not started
Completed: not completed
Onboarding steps

Move from workspace activation into the live customer app with state stored on the tenant record and progress tracked per tenant.

Step 01
Welcome

Confirm the workspace is active and move into the live customer setup flow.

Pending

Confirm the workspace details, move the tenant from pending to in progress, and unlock the live customer workspace.

Start onboarding
Step 02
Connect your environment

Choose the first production cloud or identity source you plan to connect so the workspace stays focused.

Pending
AWS
Prioritize AWS telemetry first if your cloud estate is anchored in CloudTrail, IAM, and GuardDuty.
M365
Prioritize Microsoft identity and audit coverage if Entra, email, and Defender matter first.
GCP
Prioritize GCP if your first production signal should come from projects, IAM, and audit logs.
Save preferred sourceOpen connectors
Step 03
First scan CTA

Finish onboarding and continue into the customer dashboard with billing and connector follow-up in view.

Pending

Finish onboarding and continue in the live dashboard. You can connect data sources from the connector workspace as the next step.

Finish onboarding and open dashboard
Status summary
Current onboarding state: pending.
Preferred first source: AWS.
After onboarding, continue with connectors, billing, and live dashboard review from the customer workspace.
Open dashboardOpen customer settings

steps.label: customer_dashboard
steps.title: ZonForge Sentinel
steps.body:
ZF

CUSTOMER WORKSPACE

ZonForge Sentinel

Dashboard
Alerts
Investigations
AI Assistant
Billing
Team
Settings

Executive View

Focused posture, alerts, actions, and health without analyst-only noise.

EXECUTIVE OVERVIEW

Security Dashboard

Executive posture, active threats, and action-ready customer insights.

SE

Serial 18 Customer Proof

Owner

Security Dashboard

Executive posture, active threats, and action-ready customer insights in a premium enterprise shell.

What ZonForge is doing for this workspace

ZonForge brings connected security signals into one customer-safe view so you can understand posture, see active threats, and decide what to do next.

PRIMARY NEXT ACTION
Review upgrade options
BILLING STATUS
Free • active
SYSTEM STATUS
3/3 core services healthy
Review upgrade optionsOpen billing

Compare plans and upgrade when you need more identities, connectors, or retained data.

Filter alerts and investigations without leaving the customer workspace.

Invoice history integration pending
Payment history

The billing dashboard is wired to live subscription state today. Invoice and payment history remain intentionally empty until a tenant-scoped backend invoice endpoint is exposed.

Integration-safe placeholder

No fake invoices are rendered here. When a real `/v1/billing/invoices` endpoint exists, this section can swap to live data without changing page structure.

Billing policy & safety notice

Professional guidance for customer admins managing a Stripe-backed subscription.

Backend-confirmed state only

This page never assumes a plan change completed until the backend reflects the Stripe-confirmed result.

Cancellation policy

Cancellation schedules the end of paid service at the current billing period boundary unless backend state says otherwise.

Secure action routing

Checkout, portal access, and cancellation buttons only call authenticated tenant-scoped backend routes.
